description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.11.4 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. In the global before_script run `npm install gitbook-cli -g` followed by `gitbook install`. Define a deploy stage with a job named pages that executes `gitbook build . public`, publishes the generated public/ folder as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch only. The pipeline should produce a GitLab Pages site from the built output.
